title: The Thrill of Brazil
writer: Allen Rivkin, Harry Clork, Devery Freeman
actors: Evelyn Keyes, Keenan Wynn, Ann Miller
plot: Steve, revue producer in Rio de Janeiro, is still in love with his ex-wife Vicki, his star Linda is in love with Steve and Tito is in love with Linda. Because of this they all get small problems.
